current_form.value: Came off his most prolific club season: reported ~61 goals in all competitions for Bayern Munich in 2025-26 (incl. ~33 Bundesliga goals), among the top five single-season totals in European football history. Arrives at the World Cup in peak goalscoring form.

fitness.value: Fit; no injury reported. Named to England's 26-man World Cup squad and is the leading man up front.

wc_role.value: England captain and first-choice striker at his third World Cup; talisman and penalty taker for Tuchel's side.

records.value: England's all-time top scorer (78+ goals). Captains England at a third World Cup, equalling Billy Wright's record of captaining England at three World Cups. Has 8 World Cup goals across 2018 and 2022 (level with Cristiano Ronaldo). Verify exact goal/cap figures before quoting precise stat lines.
